name: Sweet and Sour Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 green onions, cut into 1-inch slices (white and green)
1 piece fresh ginger root, quarter-sized (peeled and minced)
Salt and ground white pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a food processor fitted with a metal blade or in a blender and process until smooth.
2. Alternatively, combine the ingredients in a bowl.
3. Taste and adjust flavors as needed.
4. Pour the mixture into a saucepan over medium-low heat.
5. Cook, stirring occasionally, until thickened, about 10 to 15 minutes.
6. Serve warm.
